title: CBB Rulebook Volume 1 Operational Risk Management Module OM-2 Outsourcing Requirements
summary: Requires prior CBB approval for outsourcing to a third party outside Bahrain, with separate notification treatment for intragroup and cloud data services inside or outside Bahrain, and requires confidentiality, encryption, audit access, and reporting safeguards in service agreements.

theme_notes.data_privacy.crossborder_data_flows: Sets outsourcing approval and notification rules for Bahrain retail banks.

notes: Related instruments: Amended in July 2022 and April 2023
